## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Alex Poulos (Crossbeam) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss Marcel's new venture and industry trends.](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's new company, fwd.digital, has rapidly grown to 17 customers and $2M run rate in a short time](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [The company focuses on AI-powered content creation and research, with plans to expand into other areas](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Alex is exploring AI agents for customer interactions at Crossbeam, considering a product called OneMind](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Both discussed challenges in corporate environments and the growing interest in AI-focused roles](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Growth and Business Model

  - [Reached 17 customers and $2M run rate](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Nearly 10 full-time employees, mostly offshore](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Producing \~100,000 words of content monthly per client](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Focusing on delivering value first, then working backwards to technology](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Profitable, allowing for customer-centric approach rather than VC-driven goals](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

### AI-Powered Content and Services

  - [Offering content creation, outbound marketing, and account research](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Example: Creating tailored email outreach using AI-driven research](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - Ranking well in search results for client content (e.g., \#1 for "annual income")
  - [Expanding into AI enablement training (e.g., for Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Industry Trends and Workforce Shifts

  - [Growing interest from professionals wanting to transition into AI-focused roles](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Multiple instances of people quitting jobs to learn/work in AI](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Challenges in traditional corporate environments regarding AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Shift towards offshore hiring for cost-effective, motivated talent](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Crossbeam Updates and AI Exploration

  - [Recent acquisition of a French competitor in June](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Organizational changes and team integration ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Exploring AI agents for customer interactions (e.g., OneMind)](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Potential for AI to outperform average reps and some sales engineers](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Networking and Events

  - [Marcel hosting CMO breakfasts and dinners in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Plans for regular networking events (1-3 times per month)](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Alex attending HubSpot's INBOUND conference (12,000 attendees)](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel's EA to reach out in late October to schedule a follow-up meeting in early November](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Discuss potential collaboration on partner base initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Alex to consider trying out an offshore EA for improved productivity](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Marcel to continue hosting networking events and expanding fwd.digital's services](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Alex to keep Marcel updated on Crossbeam's AI agent experiments with OneMind](https://fathom.video/share/MubhzixGNh8nARKtthh9mQXQe7xmxnUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
